generatedFrom: docs/compatibility/winui-api-compatibility.catalog.json materials, composition, and motion entries and docs/compatibility/material-composition.md
principle: Every surface below is either a deterministic macOS approximation target or an explicit exclusion. None is real Windows OS composition: the Wine-free macOS runtime cannot reproduce DWM, the Windows compositor, system backdrops, or GPU effect graphs, so material and motion fidelity is documented and reference-gated, never claimed as OS composition. Motion is captured as deterministic end states, not animation timing.

surfaces.approximation: Layered opaque theme-surface fill that approximates the Mica tint with the theme background tokens; no desktop-wallpaper sampling, no blur, and no system backdrop.
surfaces.highContrast: Falls back to a solid high-contrast surface with visible window and content borders; no tint.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: native-winui reference before any visual promotion; WindowsNativeProbe is smoke-only.

surfaces.approximation: Static translucent-looking layered fill using theme tokens and a fixed tint opacity; no live blur of content behind the surface and no desktop Acrylic backdrop.
surfaces.highContrast: Falls back to a solid high-contrast surface with visible borders; tint and translucency are dropped.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: native-winui reference before any visual promotion; WindowsNativeProbe is smoke-only.

surfaces.approximation: Source-level object slot only; the backdrop has no OS composition behavior on macOS and is recorded as an unsupported API diagnostic when used.
surfaces.highContrast: Window uses the solid high-contrast theme surface.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: Windows-validation only; no local macOS visual support claim.

surfaces.approximation: Deterministic static drop-shadow band drawn under popups and elevated surfaces using fixed blur radius and opacity tokens; not the Windows compositor shadow and not depth-reactive.
surfaces.highContrast: Shadow is dropped; elevation is conveyed by a visible high-contrast border instead.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: native-winui reference before any visual promotion.

surfaces.approximation: Deterministic static end-state of translate, scale, rotate, and opacity applied at layout time; no animated transform clock and no compositor visual.
surfaces.highContrast: Transform is preserved; opacity floors are raised so text and borders stay visible.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: native-winui reference before any visual promotion.

surfaces.approximation: Source-level compatibility only; the compositor visual tree and effect graph are not executed on macOS and are recorded as unsupported API diagnostics when used.
surfaces.highContrast: No effect graph; surfaces use solid high-contrast theme tokens.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: Windows-validation only; no local macOS visual support claim.

surfaces.approximation: Deterministic capture of the animation end state only; the runtime renders the final visual-state values with no animation clock or timing, so evidence is stable and reproducible.
surfaces.highContrast: End-state values use high-contrast theme tokens with visible focus and state markers.
surfaces.provenanceRequirement: native-winui reference of the end state before any visual promotion.
